message:
style(ft-serialize): reorder imports alphabetically and fix comment alignment in tests

Sorts `use super::{...}` import lists into alphabetical order in two
places in the test module (the main snapshot/checkpoint imports and the
state-dict imports), matching the project's rustfmt import-ordering
convention.

Also fixes two trailing-aligned inline comments that were incorrectly
continued onto the following line (`// key: "x"` and `// key: "y"`),
restoring them to normal single-line comments at the correct indentation
level.

No logic or behaviour is changed; this is a pure formatting/style
clean-up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
